{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_16","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport re,glob,json,pandas as pd\nfrom pathlib import Path\n# check if prefix fulfillment matches totals and product inventory for sample days if all supply available before store allocation\n# parse one order path to product order quantities\nfor day in [1,2,3]:\n    print('DAY',day)\n    # total supplier qty by product\n    sup={}\n    for path in glob.glob(f'/app/raw_supplier_receipts/day_{day:03d}_*'):\n        txt=Path(path).read_text().strip()\n        items=[]\n        if path.endswith('.json'):\n            data=json.loads(txt); items=[(i['prod_id'],i['delivered_qty']) for i in data['items']]\n        elif path.endswith('.csv'):\n            df=pd.read_csv(path,sep=';'); items=list(df[['PRODUCT','DELIVERED_QTY']].itertuples(index=False,name=None))\n        elif 'key-value' in path:\n            for line in txt.splitlines():\n                m=re.search(r'PRODUCT: (P_\\\\d+) \\\\| DELIVERED_QTY: (\\\\d+)',line)\n                if m: items.append((m.group(1), int(m.group(2))))\n        else:\n            for line in txt.splitlines():\n                m=re.search(r'product (P_\\\\d+) delivered (\\\\d+) units',line)\n                if m: items.append((m.group(1), int(m.group(2))))\n        for p,q in items: sup[p]=sup.get(p,0)+q\n    # store sequence\n    stores=[]\n    for path in glob.glob(f'/app/raw_wholesaler_store_receipts/day_{day:03d}_*_receipt.txt'):\n        txt=Path(path).read_text()\n        s=re.search(r'STORE_ID: (S_\\\\d+)',txt).group(1)\n        seq=int(re.search(r'DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO: (\\\\d+)',txt).group(1))\n        tot=int(re.search(r'TOTAL_DELIVERED_UNITS: (\\\\d+)',txt).group(1))\n        stores.append((seq,s,tot))\n    stores.sort()\n    inv=sup.copy()\n    ok=True\n    for seq,s,tot in stores:\n        path=glob.glob(f'/app/raw_orders/day_{day:03d}_{s}_*')[0]\n        txt=Path(path).read_text().strip()\n        items=[]\n        if path.endswith('.json'):\n            data=json.loads(txt); items=[(i['prod_id'],i['qty']) for i in data['items']]\n        elif path.endswith('.csv'):\n            df=pd.read_csv(path,sep=';'); items=list(df[['PRODUCT','QUANTITY']].itertuples(index=False,name=None))\n        elif 'key-value' in path:\n            for line in txt.splitlines():\n                m=re.search(r'ORDER_PRODUCT: (P_\\\\d+) \\\\| ORDER_QTY: (\\\\d+)',line)\n                if m: items.append((m.group(1), int(m.group(2))))\n        else:\n            for line in txt.splitlines():\n                m=re.search(r'product (P_\\\\d+).*deliver (\\\\d+) units',line)\n                if m: items.append((m.group(1), int(m.group(2))))\n        rem=tot\n        alloc=[]\n        for p,q in items:\n            if rem<=0: break\n            take=min(q, rem, inv.get(p,0))\n            alloc.append((p,take))\n            inv[p]=inv.get(p,0)-take\n            rem-=take\n            if take<q:\n                # if rem still >0 but inv shortage hit, algorithm breaks? under brutal first-come maybe move to next product? unclear.\n                if rem>0:\n                    alloc.append(('SHORT_ON_'+p, rem))\n                break\n        if rem\"'!=0:\n            ok=False\n            print('\"' store',s,'seq',seq,'could not allocate prefix exactly, rem',rem,'tot',tot,'last alloc',alloc[-3:])\n            break\n    print('prefix exact?',ok,'remaining inv total',sum(inv.values()))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_48","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression, Ridge\ncache='/tmp/supply_cache'\nsales_agg=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sales_agg.pkl')\nsold_df=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sold_df.pkl')\np='P_1'\n# observations\nobs=sales_agg[sales_agg['product']==p][['day','store','reported_demand','sold_qty']].sort_values(['day','store']).reset_index(drop=True)\n# sold units per producer/day/store\nsub=sold_df[sold_df['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\npiv=sub.pivot_table(index=['day','store'], columns='producer', values='qty', fill_value=0).sort_index()\n# exposure kernel from prior 14 days\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.2]*7)\nX=piv.copy().astype(float)\nfor prod in X.columns:\n    vals=X[prod].unstack('store').reindex(range(1,366), fill_value=0)\n    arr=vals.values\n    exp=np.zeros_like(arr, dtype=float)\n    for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n        exp[lag:]+=w*arr[:-lag]\n    X[prod]=exp.reshape(-1, order='C')\n# align order\nX=X.reindex(pd.MultiIndex.from_frame(obs[['day','store']]), fill_value=0)\n# build design with day/store dummies\nstore_d=pd.get_dummies(obs['store'], drop_first=True)\nday_d=pd.get_dummies(obs['day'].astype(str), drop_first=True)\nD=pd.concat([store_d, day_d, X.reset_index(drop=True)], axis=1)\nmodel=LinearRegression().fit(D, obs['reported_demand'])\ncoefs=pd.Series(model.coef_, index=D.columns)\nprod_coefs=coefs[X.columns].sort_values()\nprint(prod_coefs.head(20).to_string())\nprint('most positive')\nprint(prod_coefs.tail(10).to_string())\nprint('intercept',model.intercept_,'R2',model.score(D, obs['reported_demand']))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_59","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom scipy.optimize import nnls\ncache='/tmp/supply_cache'\nsales_agg=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sales_agg.pkl')\nsold_df=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sold_df.pkl')\np='P_1'\n# demand matrix day x store\nstores=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\ndem=sales_agg[sales_agg['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores).fillna(0)\nY=dem.values.astype(float)\n# exposure tensors day x store x producer\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nsub=sold_df[sold_df['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\nproducers=sorted(sub['producer'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\nX=np.zeros((365,10,len(producers)), dtype=float)\nfor j,prod in enumerate(producers):\n    piv=sub[sub['producer']==prod].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='qty').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores).fillna(0).values\n    exp=np.zeros_like(piv)\n    for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n        exp[lag:]+=w*piv[:-lag]\n    X[:,:,j]=exp\n# init baseline via rank-1 SVD\nU,S,Vt=np.linalg.svd(Y, full_matrices=False)\na=np.abs(Vt[0])\nc=np.abs(U[:,0])*S[0]\nlam=np.zeros(len(producers))\nfor it in range(30):\n    R=Y + np.tensordot(X, lam, axes=([2],[0]))\n    # rank-1 nonnegative approx via alternating least squares\n    for _ in range(20):\n        denom=(a@a)\n        c=np.maximum((R@a)/max(denom,1e-9), 1e-9)\n        denom=(c@c)\n        a=np.maximum((R.T@c)/max(denom,1e-9), 1e-9)\n    B=np.outer(c,a)\n    target=(B-Y).reshape(-1)\n    F=X.reshape(-1,len(producers))\n    lam_new, rnorm = nnls(F, target)\n    delta=np.max(np.abs(lam_new-lam))\n    lam=lam_new\n    if it%5==0 or it==29:\n        err=np.mean((Y-(B-np.tensordot(X,lam,axes=([2],[0]))))**2)\n        print('iter',it,'delta',delta,'mse',err)\n    if delta<1e-6:\n        break\ns=pd.Series(lam,index=producers).sort_values(ascending=False)\nprint(s.head(20).to_string())\nprint('nonzero > 1e-6', (s>1e-6).sum())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_66","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"python - <<'PY'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\ncache='/tmp/supply_cache'\nsales_agg=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sales_agg.pkl')\nsold_df=pd.read_pickle(f'{cache}/sold_df.pkl')\nweights=np.array([0.8]*3+[0.5]*4+[0.2]*7)\nstores=[f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\n\ndef ols_scores(p):\n    obs=sales_agg[sales_agg['product']==p][['day','store','reported_demand']].sort_values(['day','store']).reset_index(drop=True)\n    index=pd.MultiIndex.from_product([range(1,366), stores], names=['day','store'])\n    sub=sold_df[sold_df['product']==p].groupby(['day','store','producer'], as_index=False)['qty'].sum()\n    producers=sorted(sub['producer'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    piv=sub.pivot_table(index=['day','store'], columns='producer', values='qty', fill_value=0).reindex(index, fill_value=0)\n    X=pd.DataFrame(index=index)\n    for prod in producers:\n        vals=piv[prod].unstack('store').reindex(range(1,366), fill_value=0).values\n        exp=np.zeros_like(vals, dtype=float)\n        for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n            exp[lag:]+=w*vals[:-lag]\n        X[prod]=pd.DataFrame(exp, index=range(1,366), columns=stores).stack().reindex(index, fill_value=0).values\n    X=X.reindex(pd.MultiIndex.from_frame(obs[['day','store']]), fill_value=0)\n    D=pd.concat([pd.get_dummies(obs['store'], drop_first=True, dtype=float), pd.get_dummies(obs['day'].astype(str), drop_first=True, dtype=float), X.reset_index(drop=True)], axis=1)\n    model=LinearRegression().fit(D, obs['reported_demand'])\n    coefs=pd.Series(model.coef_, index=D.columns)\n    return coefs[producers].sort_values()\nfor p in ['P_1','P_2','P_3','P_10','P_20']:\n    s=ols_scores(p)\n    print('\\\\n',p)\n    print(s.head(12).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

avail-=take; touched.add(producer)\n                    if avail==0:\n                        queue.popleft()\n                    else:\n                        queue[0][1]=avail\n                for producer in touched:\n                    counts[(day,store,producer)] += 1\n            for batch in intake.get((store,day),[]):\n                queue.append(batch.copy())\n    return pd.DataFrame([{'day':d,'store':s,'producer':pr,'count':c} for (d,s,pr),c in counts.items()])\n\ndef fit(p, count_df, placebo=False):\n    Y=sales_agg[sales_agg['product']==p].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='reported_demand').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores).fillna(0).values.astype(float)\n    producers=sorted(count_df['producer'].unique(), key=lambda x:int(x.split('_')[1]))\n    X=np.zeros((365,10,len(producers)), dtype=float)\n    for j,prod in enumerate(producers):\n        piv=count_df[count_df['producer']==prod].pivot(index='day', columns='store', values='count').reindex(index=range(1,366), columns=stores).fillna(0).values\n        exp=np.zeros_like(piv)\n        if placebo:\n            for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n                exp[:-lag]+=w*piv[lag:]\n        else:\n            for lag,w in enumerate(weights, start=1):\n                exp[lag:]+=w*piv[:-lag]\n        X[:,:,j]=exp\n    U,S,Vt=np.linalg.svd(Y, full_matrices=False)\n    a=np.abs(Vt[0]); c=np.abs(U[:,0])*S[0]; lam=np.zeros(len(producers)); F=X.reshape(-1,len(producers))\n    for _ in range(30):\n        R=Y + np.tensordot(X, lam, axes=([2],[0]))\n        for _ in range(15):\n            c=np.maximum((R@a)/max(a@a,1e-9), 1e-9)\n            a=np.maximum((R.T@c)/max(c@c,1e-9), 1e-9)\n        B=np.outer(c,a)\n        lam_new,_=nnls(F,(B-Y).reshape(-1))\n        if np.max(np.abs(lam_new-lam))<1e-6:\n            lam=lam_new; break\n        lam=lam_new\n    return pd.Series(lam,index=producers).sort_values(ascending=False)\nfor p in ['P_2','P_10','P_20']:\n    count_df=build_count_df(p)\n    real=fit(p,count_df,False)\n    pl=fit(p,count_df,True)\n    print('\\\\n',p,'placebo max',round(pl.max(),6))\n    print(real.head(12).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

break\n        lam=lam_new\n    return pd.Series(lam,index=producers).sort_values(ascending=False)\nfor p in ['P_2','P_10','P_20']:\n    count_df=build_count_df(p)\n    real=fit(p,count_df,False)\n    pl=fit(p,count_df,True)\n    print('\\\\n',p,'placebo max',round(pl.max(),6))\n    print(real.head(12).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"\n P_2 placebo max 0.067886\nPR_11    0.288709\nPR_20    0.262406\nPR_14    0.095944\nPR_58    0.094628\nPR_24    0.085397\nPR_26    0.061328\nPR_60    0.025293\nPR_36    0.019220\nPR_3     0.013944\nPR_44    0.004569\nPR_22    0.000000\nPR_21    0.000000\n\n P_10 placebo max 0.041555\nPR_58    0.265749\nPR_25    0.239011\nPR_19    0.103844\nPR_45    0.076246\nPR_60    0.069062\nPR_26    0.059369\nPR_47    0.039341\nPR_23    0.035641\nPR_52    0.008989\nPR_14    0.008196\nPR_39    0.005005\nPR_4     0.003473\n\n P_20 placebo max 0.007781\nPR_55    0.266387\nPR_43    0.215028\nPR_34    0.178625\nPR_11    0.100932\nPR_12    0.041858\nPR_46    0.034311\nPR_31    0.023380\nPR_1     0.022347\nPR_8     0.019366\nPR_51    0.017664\nPR_50    0.016560\nPR_30    0.004252\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
